creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 243042
git format-patch -1 main

- update 1.24 to 1.26

ChangeLog: https://metacpan.org/release/RURBAN/B-Keywords-1.26/source/Changes

PR:

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile"  is happy.
- Tested with:
13.2-RELEASE-p1
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.4
pkg 1.19.1
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1t-freebsd

- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
